# Wikipedia Recent Changes MCP

> Live Wikipedia edit feed, page summaries, daily trending list, Wikidata entity search

This MCP server exposes 4 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `wiki_recent_changes`: Live feed of recent edits — title, editor, timestamp, comment, size delta.
- `wiki_page_summary`: Clean summary of a Wikipedia article: extract, thumbnail, description, last modified.
- `wiki_trending`: Top-50 most-viewed English Wikipedia pages for a date (default = yesterday).
- `wikidata_search`: Search Wikidata entities by name. Up to 10 matches with Q-id + label + description.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
